name: history
description: Find historical precedents, map trajectories, predict unintended consequences, identify historical echoes, learn from past failures, and assess timing. Usable standalone or as a meta-layer on any other plugin's output to add temporal depth and pattern recognition.

skills.name: hist_precedent
skills.description: Find historical precedents for a current situation, decision, or technology. Identifies closest analogies and extracts actionable lessons.

skills.name: hist_trajectory
skills.description: Map the current situation onto known historical trajectories — adoption curves, hype cycles, industry evolution. Identifies where we are and what comes next.

skills.name: hist_consequences
skills.description: Examine second and third-order consequences by studying what happened when similar decisions were made historically. Identifies unintended effects.

skills.name: hist_rhyme
skills.description: Identify how the current moment echoes past eras — structural similarities and critical differences. History doesn't repeat but it rhymes.

skills.name: hist_failure
skills.description: Study historical failures relevant to the current situation. Diagnoses root causes, warning signs, and lessons from what went wrong.

skills.name: hist_timing
skills.description: Analyze whether the timing is right for an initiative by examining historical precedents where timing was the decisive factor between success and failure.

commands.name: hist_precedent_check
commands.description: Quick Precedent Check — 3 most relevant historical parallels

commands.name: hist_trajectory_check
commands.description: Quick Trajectory Check — where are we on the curve?

commands.name: hist_failure_check
commands.description: Quick Failure Check — 3 similar historical failures and their warning signs

commands.name: hist_rhyme_check
commands.description: Quick Historical Rhyme — what era does this echo?

commands.name: hist_timing_check
commands.description: Quick Timing Check — is now the right time based on historical precedent?

commands.name: hist_lesson
commands.description: One Lesson from History — single most important historical insight
